title: Local Planning

key_provisions.heading: 1.2 On-site signage is required for all proposals and is:
key_provisions.summary: a) Limited to sign plaques or plates affixed to the main frontage of the building.

key_provisions.heading: 3.2 Grouped and Multiple Dwellings - Maximum occupancy of no more than two
key_provisions.summary: persons per bedroom, excluding persons under 16, to a maximum of six persons.

key_provisions.heading: 5.1 Development is to be connected to a reticulated potable water supply.
key_provisions.summary: approved on-site effluent disposal system with adequate capacity for the proposed

key_provisions.heading: 5.2 Development is to be connected to a reticulated sewage or serviced by an
key_provisions.summary: approved on-site effluent disposal system with adequate capacity for the proposed

cross_references: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
